title: Is someone interested in scans of Evangelion Chronicle
display_title: Is someone interested in scans of Evangelion Chronicle
wikitext:
[]: Is someone interested in scans of Evangelion Chronicle?             Quote Post by tamh » Sun Jun 16, 2019 10:52 pm Hello all! The topic subject says it all. I'm trying to scan my copy of Evangelion Chronicle. I'm scanning it on 1200dpi (huge JPG files await). For now I'm doing binder 00. I do know it is still covered by copyright, but this reference document deserves some kind of safekeeping. Is there anyone interested on this, has this been scanned before or am I just wasting my time?

[]: Re: Is someone interested in scans of Evangelion Chronicle?             Quote Post by robersora » Mon Jun 17, 2019 12:22 am Since they seem to be legally available, I'm not sure if this is in accordance with the forum rules, lol. For sake of conservation, I would scan them, though.

[]: Re: Is someone interested in scans of Evangelion Chronicle?             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jun 17, 2019 1:57 am The first 30 volumes are scanned and online for those who know where to look. Chronicle will probably get a reprint sometime after the final movie comes out. It's not the sort of Eva resource that's rare and valuable enough for us to enable open sharing of scans here.

[]: Re: Is someone interested in scans of Evangelion Chronicle?             Quote Post by tamh » Mon Jun 17, 2019 7:41 am Reichu wrote: The first 30 volumes are scanned and online for those who know where to look. Chronicle will probably get a reprint sometime after the final movie comes out. It's not the sort of Eva resource that's rare and valuable enough for us to enable open sharing of scans here.

[]: Re: Is someone interested in scans of Evangelion Chronicle?             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jun 17, 2019 8:03 am If you're able to pull it off, there are certainly places to host it that would appreciate the effort. Just not here, for now. If you need any further guidance on these shady matters of which I shall not speak further, feel free to PM me.

[]: Re: Is someone interested in scans of Evangelion Chronicle?             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Mon Jul 01, 2019 4:40 am Volumes 1-30 are available on e-hentai and some other places. If you do scan the remaining ones, try putting them there.
